title.en: I'm already looking forward to it! 벌써 기다려져! 빨리 왔으면 좋겠다!

description.en: When you are looking forward to something fun like a picnic or a concert! Practice expressing your excitement with 벌써 기다려져 and 빨리 왔으면 좋겠다.
description.ko: 소풍이나 콘서트처럼 즐거운 일을 앞두고 시간이 빨리 가길 바랄 때! 벌써 기다려져와 빨리 왔으면 좋겠다를 사용해 설레는 마음을 표현해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Anticipation. Excitement. Waiting. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존! 이번 주말에 제가 정말 좋아하는 가수의 콘서트가 있어요.
content.translation: John! There's a concert by my favorite singer this weekend.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 어렵게 티켓을 구한 거라 벌써부터 가슴이 두근거려요.
content.translation: I got the tickets with great difficulty. so my heart is already fluttering.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Oh, I can't wait! 정말 벌써부터 기다려지겠는데요!
content.translation: Oh, I can't wait! I bet you're already looking forward to it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 저도 그 가수 노래 정말 좋아해요. 빨리 주말이 왔으면 좋겠네요!
content.translation: I really love that singer's songs too. I wish the weekend would come sooner!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 시간이 평소보다 훨씬 느리게 가는 것 같아요.
content.translation: Exactly. It feels like time is passing much slower than usual.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 벌써 기다려져. This phrase shows how excited you are right now. right.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 어떤 일을 생각만 해도 기분이 좋고 고대하고 있다는 뜻이에요.
content.translation: Yes. It means you feel good just thinking about something and are looking forward to it.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 아직 시간이 남았는데도 지금 당장 하고 싶을 만큼 설렐 때 자주 써요.
content.translation: It's often used when you're so excited that you want to do it right now. even though there's still time left.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 벌써 기다려져.
content.translation: I'm already looking forward to it.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Then what about 빨리 왔으면 좋겠다.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 이건 시간이 빨리 흘러서 그날이 오기를 바라는 간절한 마음을 담은 표현이에요.
content.translation: This is an expression containing a sincere heart wishing for time to pass quickly and for that day to come.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: "빨리 ~했으면 좋겠다"처럼 뒤에 다양한 상황을 넣어서 쓸 수도 있어요.
content.translation: You can also use it by putting various situations behind it. like 'I wish I could do ~ sooner'.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 빨리 왔으면 좋겠다.
content.translation: I wish it would come sooner.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine we've been waiting for months for the second season of a famous show. and it finally releases tonight!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존! 드디어 오늘 밤에 우리가 기다리던 드라마 시즌 2가 공개된대요!
content.translation: John! Finally. the second season of the drama we've been waiting for is being released tonight!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Really? Finally! I've been waiting for this since last year.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 저도요! 오늘 퇴근하고 바로 볼 거예요. 벌써부터 너무 기다려져요!
content.translation: Me too! I'm going to watch it right after work today. I'm already looking forward to it so much!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Me too. I'm going to prepare some popcorn and soda.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 생각만 해도 행복하네요. 빨리 퇴근 시간이 왔으면 좋겠어요!
content.translation: Just thinking about it makes me happy. I wish it was time to leave work already!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 우리 내일 방송에서 같이 후기 이야기해요!
content.translation: John. let's talk about the review together on tomorrow's show!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Sounds like a plan! I'll see you tomorrow.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Having something to look forward to makes life so much more fun.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 설레는 계획을 세우고 그날을 기다리는 과정 자체가 큰 행복인 것 같아요.
content.translation: Right. I think the process of making exciting plans and waiting for that day is a great happiness in itself.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 오늘 배운 표현들로 여러분의 설레는 마음을 주변에 마음껏 표현해 보세요!
content.translation: Express your fluttering heart to those around you with the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "anticipation" reactions one last time.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 벌써 기다려져! I can't wait!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 빨리 왔으면 좋겠다! I wish it would come sooner!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 너무 기대돼! I'm so looking forward to it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 시간이 빨리 갔으면 좋겠어! I wish time would pass quickly!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 잠이 안 올 것 같아! I don't think I can sleep!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 밤. 내일이 기다려지는 설레는 마음으로 단잠 주무시길 바랄게요.
content.translation: I hope you all have a sweet sleep tonight with an excited heart looking forward to tomorrow.

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 소풍날이 벌써부터 기다려져요. (I'm already looking forward to the picnic day.)

vocabulary.meaning: To be sincere. To be earnest
vocabulary.example: 합격을 간절하게 바라고 있어요. (I'm earnestly wishing for the acceptance.)
새로운 영화가 이번 주에 공개돼요. (A new movie will be released this week.)
여행을 다녀온 후기를 블로그에 남겼어요. (I left a review of my trip on my blog.)

vocabulary.meaning: To look forward to. To anticipate
vocabulary.example: 우리는 이 날을 오랫동안 고대해 왔어요. (We have been looking forward to this day for a long time.)
콘서트 티켓팅에 성공해서 정말 기뻐요. (I'm so happy that I succeeded in buying concert tickets.)
